# ProGameStore

> ProGameStore is the paid counterpart to FreeGameStore. A marketplace for premium browser games with multiplayer lobbies, cloud sync, server-side AI opponents, daily challenges, and Stripe-powered subscriptions. Games are PWAs built with TypeScript and any rendering approach (Canvas, WebGL, DOM, Phaser, Kaplay, Pixi, Babylon.js). The platform is pre-launch; no games are published yet.

## Status

Pre-launch. The org exists with infrastructure in progress. Build your game on FreeGameStore first; when Pro launches, you'll be the natural first wave.

## AI Agent Integration

- [skills.md](https://progamestore.online/skills.md): Platform guide for AI agents. What Pro adds over Free, planned SDK, architecture, deploy flow.
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.freeappstore.online/mcp): Remote MCP server (Streamable HTTP) covering the whole platform family. Connect with `npx mcp-remote https://mcp.freeappstore.online/mcp`.
- [FreeGameStore Skills](https://freegamestore.online/SKILLS.md): The free tier guide. Pro games will use the same SDK and patterns.

## What Pro Adds Over Free

- Real-time rooms: uncapped (vs 5 rooms x 25 connections on free)
- Server-side AI for NPCs, procgen, opponents
- Cloud sync with 10MB/user (vs localStorage only)
- Scheduled workers (daily challenges, digests)
- Custom domains
- Stripe Connect subscriptions with developer-set pricing
- Large multiplayer lobbies and persistent worlds

## Sister Sites

- [FreeGameStore](https://freegamestore.online): Free games, MIT-licensed, no tracking.
- [FreeAppStore](https://freeappstore.online): Free PWA apps.
- [ProAppStore](https://proappstore.online): Paid PWA apps.
- [FreeWebStore](https://freewebstore.online): Free AI-built single-page sites.
- [ProWebStore](https://prowebstore.online): AI-operated CMS for business sites.

## Platform

- [GitHub Org](https://github.com/progamestore-online): Source code and issue tracker.
- [Store](https://progamestore.online/): Landing page (coming soon).
